basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Research Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website iitd.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Control Systems or a closely related discipline
qualification.details: PhD in Control Systems or a closely related discipline.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Research Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate - I position at IIT Delhi is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Control Systems or a closely related discipline to be eligible for the Research Associate - I position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 58,000 per month, plus HRA at 27%.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Delhi Research Associate - I vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email. Ensure you attach all required documents and clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate - I position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the provided link in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
